title: citrus × bigaradia var. glaberrima
intro: Citrus × bigaradia var. glaberrima, commonly known as the Bergamot Orange, is a citrus plant that is known for its distinctive, citrusy aroma and flavor. Its medicinal properties include its high content of bergamot oil, which has been traditionally used to reduce anxiety and stress, as well as to alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The health benefits of consuming Bergamot Orange include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. The Bergamot Orange is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
